appliedUpdates.description: Added CLI-focused validation concurrency guidance and isolation rules for compiler user-testing runs.

notes: No completed implementation features in milestone misc-followups-3 declared fulfills assertions, so there were no pending contract assertions to exercise. Baseline CLI validators still passed in the flake environment.

orchestratorOverride.reason: misc-followups-3 had no fulfills-mapped assertions by design. The behavior that later needed contract coverage was added as VAL-SEM-018 and validated in the follow-up milestone misc-followups-3-fix, so no separate zero-assertion rerun is needed.
